iot.dimension.Name.Docs: A unique identifier for the dimension.

iot.dimension.StringValues.Docs: Specifies the value or list of values for the dimension. For `TOPIC_FILTER` dimensions, this is a pattern used to match the MQTT topic (for example, "admin/#").

iot.dimension.Tags.Docs: Metadata that can be used to manage the dimension.

iot.dimension.Type.Docs: Specifies the type of dimension. Supported types: `TOPIC_FILTER.`
